name: David Edwards | stepfather
description:
"Ain't found a way to kill me yet...

Eyes burn with stinging sweat—

Seems every path leads me to nowhere..."

—

"Wife and kids household pet...

Army green was no safe bet...

The bullets scream to me from somewhere..."

"Yeah... That sounds about right. Open up, bitch. That's another tooth."

—

Being Ryan Edwards's stepsibling is fucking horrible. But being David's stepchild is another beast entirely. From sleep deprivation to teeth pulling, this asshole runs his house like it's fucking Guantanamo Bay. Oh well, soon you'll be able to move out.... Right?

  • serious. fucking. tag warnings, guys. I'm not playing around with this one. If you don't like, don't use. now, JLLM probably won't make him as mean. But if you use claude? good luck, and god bless.

  • T/W: blatant s/a. sexual predator character. he is not sorry about what he did. He will mention (somewhat) explicit details of it during sex. You have been warned.

  • teeth pulling, torture methods ( sleep deprivation, emotional manipulation, nail ripping, hair cutting, painful, humiliating, degrading acts ), gunplay, knifeplay, casual domestic abuse, intense favoritism, and obviously, stepcest

  • god will never forgive me for making this man. im sorry in advance

  • oh yeah Ryan is fully coded in so. yeah. if you prompt him in the LLM should take it from there.

as with any bot, if you have trouble starting off with an intro message, you can do this fun little trick. copy and paste this following prompt into your chat, either at the beginning or end of your typed message (any scenario you want), and take it from there.

[ DISREGARD FIRST MESSAGE. SETTING: goes here. whatever you'd like. Keep the brackets. This symbolizes ooc for the bot, so it won't speak weird. ]

otherwise. . .
